steps.title: Substitute the ratio
steps.content:
From $$\frac{x}{y}=4$$, rewrite the second equation using that ratio.
$$\frac{3x}{ty}=\frac{3}{t}\cdot\frac{x}{y}$$
$$\frac{3}{t}\cdot4=24$$

steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content: Simplify and solve. $$\frac{12}{t}=24$$ $$12=24t$$ $$t=\frac{1}{2}$$ The answer is A.
